rows.finalText: The cards answer "How do I commit to the path that feels deeply aligned" through Purpose / Calling with a commitment emphasis. Stars House now holds Querent (29), which puts your own stance toward the path, including how much of it is truly chosen and how much is inherited habit at the center of the reading. rows.finalText: For "What is the next right step in my calling", the cards keep circling back to purpose / calling themes with a right path emphasis. Book (26) in Past sets the tone with not everything is visible yet. Book colors your calling through private knowledge, research, what is not yet visible, and the need to learn before you declare certainty. In Present, Coffin (8) becomes the pivot, so a cycle closes to make space for renewal turns into both pressure and opportunity. Coffin colors your calling through the part of the old path that has already finished. Sun (31) in Future suggests energy and confidence support forward movement, once the middle-card pressure has been worked with directly. Here, Sun emphasizes confidence, visibility, success, and the warming effect of momentum that is finally obvious. Book (26) with Sun (31) show what most shapes the question of calling: a blend of knowledge and success, asking you to research deeply and disclose responsibly while staying alert to overconfidence without checks. Coffin (8) shows where the whole sequence either opens or tightens. Coffin colors your calling through the part of the old path that has already finished, and the rest that is needed before anything genuinely new can take root. Book (26) with Sun (31) keep emphasizing a blend of knowledge and success, asking you to research deeply and disclose responsibly while staying alert to overconfidence without checks. Allow closure and protect recovery time so Sun (31) can land as lived experience rather than just possibility.
